plan_scene_limits_free.detail: Free plan user got estimated_scenes=3 (capped by PLAN_SCENE_LIMITS['free']=3)

plan_scene_limits_api.detail: GET /api/pipeline/options returns plan_scene_limits with correct values: free=3, starter=4, pro=6, premium=6

credit_reservation_on_create.detail: New job credit_status='reserved' immediately after creation

credit_finalization_on_complete.detail: After pipeline completes, credit_status changes to 'finalized'

job_metadata_fields.detail: Job doc contains user_plan, plan_scene_limit, cache_hit, credit_status fields

scene_cache_miss.detail: First job with new prompt: cache_hit=false, prompt_hash stored after completion

scene_cache_hit.detail: Second job with same prompt: cache_hit=true, 3 scenes pre-populated, LLM skipped

priority_queue.detail: Free user gets queue_priority='standard', paid users get 'priority'

progress_labels.detail: STAGE_LABELS use 'Step X/3' format. Image progress shows 'Step 2/3: Generated image X of Y'

pipeline_performance.detail: 3-scene job completed in 79s: scenes=7s, images=57s (parallel), voices=13s (parallel)
